story_summary: A single young female lead performs a casual bedroom dance while a large square reference-card overlay previews a Finn-inspired character look, then a hand-over-lens wipe transitions into a cosplay-style reveal in the same room.

source_sampling.method: ffprobe metadata plus ffmpeg representative frame extraction and cut-window inspection
source_sampling.notes: Representative frames were sampled across the full clip, then the 5.2s-6.2s window was inspected in finer detail to isolate the hand-over-lens transition.

audio_notes: Source audio was extracted to source_audio.mp3 for packaging. The audio was not separately transcribed.

scenes.summary: The lead stands centered in a beige bedroom wearing a pale pink fitted tee and gray drawstring sweatpants while doing small TikTok-style hand choreography. A large square cartoon reference card sits over the lower center of frame for the whole scene, foreshadowing the later costume reveal.

camera.movement: locked camera with only subject motion

on_screen_text: No intentional text is part of the concept. A TikTok watermark and username appear on the lower left in the source and should be removed in the remake.
scenes.environment: Warm beige bedroom with slanted ceiling, black ceiling fan near the top edge, white door, a small wall shelf on the left, and a desk plus hanging vine decor on the right.
overlay_observations: A square inserted character card covers the lower-center torso area from the start of the scene until the lens-cover transition.
scenes.transformation_role: hook / baseline dance with inserted reference card preview

scenes.summary: A feminine hand rushes directly into the lens and briefly fills the frame with warm peach blur, acting as a practical wipe that bridges the casual look and the costume reveal.

camera.framing: same centered vertical framing, but almost fully occluded by the hand
camera.movement: camera stays fixed while the subject creates the transition by covering the lens
camera.stability: static source framing with intentional foreground occlusion

on_screen_text: No intentional text. The source watermark is briefly visible under the occlusion and should not be regenerated.
scenes.environment: The same bedroom is implied but mostly hidden behind the hand blur.

scenes.summary: The same lead reappears in the same bedroom wearing a Finn-inspired costume: white bear-ear hat, fitted turquoise long-sleeve top or dress silhouette, cobalt mini skirt, visible lime-green backpack, and white thigh-high socks, while doing playful in-place arm gestures.

camera.framing: centered full-body to mid-thigh vertical smartphone framing
camera.movement: locked camera with small in-place performance movement

on_screen_text: No intentional text is required. A TikTok watermark and username appear on the lower right in the source and should be removed in the remake.
scenes.environment: Same beige bedroom, same slanted ceiling and ceiling fan, same white door, shelf, desk, and hanging vine decor as scene_001.
